description: Dynatrace Real User Monitoring beacons (/bf? and /rb_bf) — pure telemetry, never part of the business flow, and their payloads embed session-unique values that can never replay.
llmFlowNotes: Dynatrace RUM beacons (/bf?, /rb_bf) are monitoring telemetry: never try to correlate or repair them; they are safe to disable.
